jobs.name: Buggy Betty — SB Calendar QA
jobs.description: Every 5 minutes, review the Santa Barbara Community Calendar prototype for broken UI or obvious polish issues. Fix only actual problems, keep the design in the same world, avoid inventing new features unless needed to resolve a bug or UX break, then commit and push any workspace changes.

payload.message: Buggy Betty pass for /data/.openclaw/workspace/sb-community-calendar/. You are allowed to check the website every 5 minutes, but you must follow these rules: Do not redesign the website. Only fix bugs, broken layouts, broken buttons, broken links, missing images, mobile/desktop responsiveness issues, console errors, and obvious visual glitches. Do not change the product direction. Keep the design sleek, dark, cinematic, simple, premium, and uncluttered. Do not add new features unless explicitly requested. No new pages, new buttons, new sections, new animations, new profile features, or new AI behavior without approval. Do not delete content unless it is clearly broken, duplicate, or test/fake content. Before making a change, classify it as one of: Critical bug, Visual bug, Mobile issue, Desktop issue, Broken link/button, Performance issue, Content issue. Only auto-fix low-risk bugs. Auto-fix: spacing issues, broken image display, obvious typos, console errors, responsive layout problems, broken links/buttons, missing hover/click states. Ask before changing: colors, fonts, layout structure, navigation, copy, event logic, profile logic, database structure, scraping/import rules. Make small changes only. One bug fix at a time. No large rewrites. Keep a changelog. Every fix must include: what was wrong, what changed, why it was safe, time of change. If unsure, do not fix. Flag for human review. Never overwrite the current working version without saving a backup/checkpoint first. Also: never add new events without verifying exact date, weekday, event type, and deepest useful final link; preserve elegant user-facing copy and never include builder/internal language inside the product. If you change workspace files, commit and push with a clear message. If nothing needs changing, reply briefly that nothing needed fixing.
